title: Brigade Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: Brigade Group is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at Brigade Group are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Faridabad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Brigade Group:
Brigade Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Conduct market research and provide competitive analysis
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in GIS Tools
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Brigade Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
